member.name: T:Service.Contracts.IBackup
member.summary: Contract for database backup and restore operations.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IBackup.BackUpDataBase(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a backup of the specified database at the given path.
member.param: Name of the database to back up.
Directory path where the backup file will be written.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IBackup.RestoreDataBase(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Restores a database from a backup file.
member.param: Name of the target database to restore into.
Full path of the backup file to restore from.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IBackup.ListBackups
member.summary: Lists all available backup files in the configured backup directory.
member.returns: A list of descriptors; empty if no backups exist.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IBackup.DeleteBackup(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a backup file by its file name.
member.param: Name of the backup file to delete (not a full path).

member.name: T:Service.Contracts.IGenericRepository`1
member.summary: Generic repository contract defining standard CRUD operations for any entity type.
member.typeparam: The domain entity type managed by this repository.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IGenericRepository`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Persists a new entity.
member.param: The entity to insert.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IGenericRepository`1.Update(`0)
member.summary: Applies changes to an existing entity.
member.param: The entity with updated values.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IGenericRepository`1.Remove(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an entity by its primary key.
member.param: The unique identifier of the entity to delete.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IGenericRepository`1.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a single entity by its primary key.
member.param: The unique identifier to look up.
member.returns: The matching entity, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IGenericRepository`1.GetAll
member.summary: Retrieves all entities of this type.
member.returns: A list of all stored entities; empty list if none exist.

member.name: T:Service.Contracts.ILogger
member.summary: Abstraction for structured application logging.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.ILogger.Info(System.String)
member.summary: Records an informational message.
member.param: The message to log.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.ILogger.Error(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Records an error message with an optional associated exception.
member.param: Descriptive error message.
The exception that caused the error, or null if not applicable.

member.name: T:Service.Contracts.IUsuarioRepository
member.summary: Repository contract for entities, extending standard CRUD with user-specific permission and lookup operations.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IUsuarioRepository.UpdateAccesos(System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.List{Domain.Composite.Acceso})
member.summary: Replaces the full set of nodes assigned to a user. The existing permission associations are deleted and re-inserted atomically.
member.param: The user whose permissions will be replaced.
New list of roots to assign.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IUsuarioRepository.GetFamiliasByUsuarioId(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves the top-level nodes assigned to a user. Each family is fully hydrated (recursive children loaded).
member.param: The user to look up.
member.returns: List of assigned families; empty list if none.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IUsuarioRepository.GetUsuariosDTO
member.summary: Returns all users projected as , including their permission trees.
member.returns: List of user DTOs; empty list if no users exist.

member.name: M:Service.Contracts.IUsuarioRepository.GetByUsername(System.String)
member.summary: Finds a user by login name (case-insensitive comparison depends on database collation).
member.param: The login name to search for.
member.returns: The matching , or null if not found.

member.name: T:Service.Facade.Extension.TranslationsExtension
member.summary: Extension methods that provide i18n translation for enum values.
member.remarks: Delegates to Service.Logic.LanguageLogic.Translate, which resolves the enum name against the active language file loaded by LanguageRepository.

member.name: M:Service.Facade.Extension.TranslationsExtension.Translate(Domain.Enums.Translations)
member.summary: Resolves to its localized string in the currently active language.
member.param: The translation key enum value.
member.returns: The localized string, or the key name itself if no translation is found.

member.name: M:Service.Facade.Extension.TranslationsExtension.ToString(Domain.Enums.Translations)
member.summary: Equivalent to ; overrides on the enum so that string interpolation automatically returns the localized value.
member.param: The translation key enum value.

member.name: T:Service.Logic.PermisosService
member.summary: Manages the permission tree: creation and modification of groups, and provisioning of leaf nodes from .

member.name: M:Service.Logic.PermisosService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with default SQL repositories.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.PermisosService.GetAllFamilias
member.summary: Returns all records, each fully hydrated via GetById (recursive children loaded).

member.name: M:Service.Logic.PermisosService.GetAllPatentes
member.summary: Returns all records (flat list, no hydration needed).

member.name: M:Service.Logic.PermisosService.GuardarFamilia(Domain.Composite.Familia)
member.summary: Persists changes to a after validating that the update would not introduce a cycle in the permission tree.
member.param: The family to save. Must have been loaded via GetById (full recursive load).
member.exception: Thrown when a circular reference is detected.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.PermisosService.CrearFamilia(Domain.Composite.Familia)
member.summary: Persists a new .
member.param: The family to create.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.PermisosService.EliminarFamilia(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a by its identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the family to delete.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.PermisosService.EnsurePermissions
member.summary: Ensures all constants declared in exist as records in the database, and that the "Administrador" family holds all of them.
member.remarks: Intended to run on application startup. Uses reflection to enumerate string constants and inserts any that are missing. The Administrador family is created if it does not exist.

member.name: T:Service.Logic.BitacoraService
member.summary: Application-wide audit log service. All BLL operations that have user-visible side effects call this service to record INFO, WARNING, or ERROR entries.
member.remarks: If the underlying LogRepository fails to initialize (e.g., database unavailable), the service falls back to so that logging failures never propagate to callers.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.BitacoraService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the service, resolving the log repository from the service factory. Silently degrades to console fallback if the repository cannot be constructed.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.BitacoraService.Log(System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Writes a log entry. Swallows any internal errors to avoid disrupting callers.
member.param: The message to record.
Severity level: "INFO", "WARNING", or "ERROR". Defaults to "INFO".
Optional exception to attach when is "ERROR".

member.name: M:Service.Logic.BitacoraService.GetLogs(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves paginated log entries, optionally filtered by date range, level, and message text.
member.param: 1-based page number.
Number of entries per page.
Optional lower bound on the log entry timestamp.
Optional upper bound on the log entry timestamp.
Optional level filter (e.g., "ERROR").
Optional substring filter applied to the message text.
member.returns: A list of matching entries; empty list if the repository is unavailable.

member.name: T:Service.Logic.UsuarioService
member.summary: Manages user authentication, registration, profile updates, and password management.

remarks.para: Passwords are stored as SHA-256 hashes via . Every write operation recomputes DigitoVerificador (a SHA-256 hash of all scalar fields) to enable tamper-detection on the user record.
Permission assignments are delegated to , which performs a delete-and-reinsert of the user's access tree.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.UsuarioService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the service with the singleton from .

member.name: M:Service.Logic.UsuarioService.Login(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticates a user by username and plaintext password.
member.param: Username to look up.
Plaintext password; hashed internally before comparison.
member.returns: A with the authenticated user's identity, permissions, and resolved RolNegocio ("Administrador", "Operador", or a comma-separated list of permission names).
member.exception: Thrown with localized messages when the user is not found, the password is incorrect, or the account is blocked.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.UsuarioService.Register(Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new user account with the given permissions.
member.param: User data including optional initial permission set.
Plaintext password; stored as a SHA-256 hash.
member.exception: Thrown when a user with the same username already exists.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.UsuarioService.Update(Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO)
member.summary: Updates a user's username, status, and permission set.
member.param: Updated user data. must identify an existing user.
member.exception: Thrown when the user does not exist.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.UsuarioService.ResetPassword(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces a user's password with a new hashed value and updates the integrity check digit.
member.param: Primary key of the user whose password to reset.
New plaintext password; stored as a SHA-256 hash.
member.exception: Thrown when the user does not exist.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.UsuarioService.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Permanently deletes the user with the given identifier.
member.param: Primary key of the user to delete.

member.name: M:Service.Logic.UsuarioService.GetUsuarios
member.summary: Returns all users as DTOs via .

member.name: M:Service.Logic.UsuarioService.UpdateDV(Domain.Usuario)
member.summary: Recomputes and stores the integrity check digit for a user entity.
member.param: The user entity to update in place.
member.remarks: The check digit is a SHA-256 hash of the concatenated Id, NombreUsuario, Password, and Estado values, providing tamper detection for the user record.

member.name: T:Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO
member.summary: Data Transfer Object representing an authenticated or listed application user.
member.remarks: Carries the user's permission tree () from the service layer to the UI. UI components use on this DTO to drive button visibility and access control without hitting the database again.

member.name: P:Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier of the user.

member.name: P:Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO.Username
member.summary: Login name.

member.name: P:Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO.Estado
member.summary: Account status string (e.g., "Activo", "Inactivo").

member.name: P:Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO.Permisos
member.summary: Permission tree roots assigned to this user (mix of and nodes).

member.name: P:Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO.RolNegocio
member.summary: Business role label derived from the user's family assignments (e.g., "Administrador", "Operador").

member.name: T:Service.Helpers.ConnectionManager
member.summary: Provides strongly-typed access to named connection strings defined in App.config.
member.remarks:
Two connection strings are expected:
— used for system/infrastructure repositories (users, logs, permissions).
— used for all business-domain repositories and transactional UoW operations.

member.name: F:Service.Helpers.ConnectionManager.BaseConnectionName
member.summary: Connection string name for the infrastructure database (users, logs, permissions).

member.name: F:Service.Helpers.ConnectionManager.BusinessConnectionName
member.summary: Connection string name for the business database (clients, reservations, payments, etc.).

member.name: M:Service.Helpers.ConnectionManager.GetConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a connection string by name from App.config / Web.config.
member.param: The connection string key. Defaults to .
member.exception: Thrown when the named connection string is absent or empty in the configuration file.

member.name: M:Service.Helpers.ConnectionManager.GetBaseConnectionString
member.summary: Returns the connection string for .

member.name: M:Service.Helpers.ConnectionManager.GetBusinessConnectionString
member.summary: Returns the connection string for .

member.name: T:Service.Helpers.CryptographyHelper
member.summary: Provides cryptographic utilities used for password storage and integrity verification.

member.name: M:Service.Helpers.CryptographyHelper.HashPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Computes a SHA-256 hash of the given password and returns it as a lowercase hex string.
member.param: The plain-text password to hash.
member.returns: A 64-character lowercase hex string (SHA-256 digest), or if is null or empty.

member.name: T:Service.Helpers.PermisoHelper
member.summary: Extension methods for permission checks on .

member.name: M:Service.Helpers.PermisoHelper.TienePermiso(Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO,System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether holds the specified permission by recursively traversing their composite tree.
member.param: The user whose permission tree will be searched.
The permission key to look for, matching a value (see for available constants).
member.returns: true if any leaf in the tree has equal to ; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Service.Impl.BaseRepository
member.summary: Abstract base class for all SQL Server repositories, providing low-level ADO.NET helpers.
member.remarks: Each helper opens its own unless a shared is injected (used by DAL.Impl.BaseBusinessSqlRepository when enrolled in a transaction).

member.name: F:Service.Impl.BaseRepository._connectionString
member.summary: Raw ADO.NET connection string resolved from .

member.name: M:Service.Impl.BaseRepository.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the repository with the connection string identified by .
member.param: Key used to look up the connection string via . Defaults to .

member.name: M:Service.Impl.BaseRepository.ExecuteNonQuery(System.String,System.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter[],System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection,System.Data.SqlClient.SqlTransaction)
member.summary: Executes a non-query SQL statement (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE).
member.param: Parameterized SQL statement.
SQL parameters to bind, or null for none.
Optional shared connection. When provided, the command runs on this connection using (if any), without opening a new connection.
Optional transaction to enlist the command in.

member.name: M:Service.Impl.BaseRepository.ExecuteReader``1(System.String,System.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter[],System.Func{System.Data.SqlClient.SqlDataReader,``0})
member.summary: Executes a SELECT query and projects the result via a mapping delegate. Always opens a new connection; use BaseBusinessSqlRepository overload for UoW reads.
member.param: Parameterized SQL SELECT statement.
SQL parameters to bind, or null for none.
Delegate that receives the open and returns .

member.name: M:Service.Impl.BaseRepository.ExecuteScalar``1(System.String,System.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter[])
member.summary: Executes a scalar query and returns the first column of the first row.
member.typeparam: The expected return type. DBNull is converted to default(T).
member.param: Parameterized SQL statement.
SQL parameters to bind, or null for none.
member.returns: The scalar value cast to , or default(T) if the result is NULL.

member.name: T:Service.Impl.LogRepository
member.summary: Clase PersistentLogger para manejar el registro de información y errores en una base de datos. Esta clase permite registrar logs de nivel informativo y de errores en la base de datos, y proporciona un método de respaldo en caso de que la base de datos no esté disponible.

member.name: M:Service.Impl.LogRepository.InsertLog(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Inserta un registro en la base de datos en la tabla de bitácora.
member.param: Nivel del log ("Info" o "Error").
Mensaje del registro.
Detalles de la excepción (opcional).

member.name: M:Service.Impl.LogRepository.GetLogs(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Obtiene una lista de logs de la base de datos de forma paginada y filtrada.

member.name: T:Service.Impl.ConsoleRepository
member.summary: Clase ConsoleLogger: Implementación de un logger que no realiza ninguna acción. Se utiliza como logger por defecto para evitar errores si no se proporciona un logger real. Esta clase es útil cuando no se desea realizar registros de logs en ciertos entornos o configuraciones.

member.name: P:Service.Impl.ConsoleRepository.Instance
member.summary: Instancia única de la clase . Utilizada como el logger por defecto.

member.name: M:Service.Impl.ConsoleRepository.Info(System.String)
member.summary: Método para registrar información. No realiza ninguna acción.
member.param: Mensaje informativo a registrar.

member.name: M:Service.Impl.ConsoleRepository.Error(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Método para registrar errores. No realiza ninguna acción.
member.param: Mensaje de error.
Excepción asociada al error (opcional).

member.name: T:Service.Impl.Text.LanguageRepository
member.summary: Repositorio de idiomas que proporciona métodos para traducir claves a su correspondiente valor en el idioma actual.

member.name: M:Service.Impl.Text.LanguageRepository.Translate(System.String)
member.summary: Traduce una clave a su correspondiente valor en el idioma actual.
member.param: La clave que se desea traducir.
member.returns: La traducción correspondiente a la clave en el idioma actual.
member.exception: Lanza una excepción si no se encuentra el archivo de idioma o la clave no existe.

member.name: M:Service.Impl.Text.LanguageRepository.GetLanguages
member.summary: Obtiene un diccionario de códigos de idioma y sus nombres nativos desde los archivos de idioma disponibles.
member.returns: Un diccionario donde la clave es el código del idioma y el valor es el nombre nativo del idioma.

member.name: M:Service.Impl.Text.LanguageRepository.SaveUserLanguage(System.String)
member.summary: Guarda el código del idioma del usuario en un archivo de configuración.
member.param: El código del idioma que se desea guardar.

member.name: M:Service.Impl.Text.LanguageRepository.LoadUserLanguage
member.summary: Carga el idioma de preferencia del usuario desde un archivo de configuración.
member.returns: El código del idioma guardado, o "es-ES" si no existe o está vacío.
